#  Search for and Apply Filters to the Change Events Tool 
##  Background 
The search feature helps you find change events that contain information matching your keyword search. You can also apply filters to narrow the items in view.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Change Events tool.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Change Event](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/create-a-change-event)


##  Steps 
  * Search for Change Events in Each Tab
  * Apply Filters to the Change Events Tool


### Search for Change Events in Each Tab
  1. Navigate to the project's **Change Events** tool.
  2. Click one of the tabs where the search feature is available: 
#####  Note
The search feature searches each tab separately. For example, if the Detail tab is active when you perform a search, Procore only searches the Detail tab for matches.
     * **Detail**.
     * **Summary**.
     * **RFQs**.
     * **Recycle Bin**.
  3. Press ENTER or click the magnifying glass ![Icon Search](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0e1287800ad9e8908deec3df3b65ebd0/c5fc5af3e51b77953edf62739fba7b2c/icon-search.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon to start the search.  
If matches are found, Procore refreshes the page to show only items matching your search criteria. If not matches appear, a message appears to let you know there are no matching items.


### Apply Filters to the Change Events Tool
You can apply different filters to your change events table.
  1. Navigate to the project's **Change Events** tool.
  2. Click one of the tabs where the search feature is available:
     * **Detail**.
     * **Summary**.
     * **RFQs**.
     * **Recycle Bin**.
  3. Click the **Add Filter** drop-down list and choose one of the available options. 
#####  Note
     * To learn about the available filter options in each tab, see [Which filters can I apply to the Change Events tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-filters-can-i-apply-to-the-change-events-tool)
![Filter Change Events](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/81225001ad9e2357bf7cd4b286717d41/39240e943dbe30602b8553d41dc5e756/filter-change-events.png?fm=webp)


## See Also

  * [View, Filter, and Search RFQs](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/view-filter-and-search-rfqs)
  * [Review RFQ Responses](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/review-rfq-responses)
title: Search for and Apply Filters to the Change Events Tool
description: How to view, apply filters, and search for change events using the project's Change Events tool.
